nameMeanings.name: Clary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably from Middle English clary, clarie ‘clary’ (the pot herb Salvia sclarea), either a topographic name denoting someone who lived near where the plant grew or a metonymic occupational name for someone who sold these herbs.

variants.name: Cleary
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Malachy, Aileen, Brigid, Ronan, Aine, Bridie, Egan, William Kevin.

Irish (especially Tipperary): from Ó Cléirigh ‘descendant of Cléireach’, a name meaning ‘clerk’ or ‘cleric’. Ó Cléirigh is a famous learned family in Ireland. The less common surname McCleary , formed with the article, Mac an Chléirigh ‘son of the cleric’, is a variant. Both Irish names are also commonly Anglicized by translation as Clarke .

variants.name: Clarey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Delma, Donovan.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: John Clary was born in 1612, in England. He married ? on 5 February 1643. He died on 10 July 1672, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 60, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ko.lifeSummary: John Clary(은)는 1612년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 1643년 2월 5일 ?(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1672년 7월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: John Clary родился в 1612 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени ? 5 февраля 1643 г. Он умер 10 июля 1672 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
